prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: Colorful LEGO-style building blocks on a table. Individual small blocks are labeled with primitive validators: blue "isString", orange "isNumber", green "isBoolean", purple "isArray". A hand is shown snapping these blocks together to build larger composite structures: an "isUser" validator made of "isString" + "isNumber" + "isBoolean" blocks arranged in a specific pattern, and an "isUserList" made by combining "isArray" with "isUser". The assembled structures click together with satisfying connection points. A finished complex validator stands proudly on the right, clearly built from smaller pieces.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
